data.name: MILF's Camp🔥
data.detailed_description:
Dive deep down into a summer festival - hundreds of tents, thousands of people, music, mysteries, and temptation! In Sex Camp, you play as Mike, a college student who arrives with his childhood friend Fiona for a week of unforgettable memories.


Thousands of visitors camp here taking their part in unexpected adventures in the middle of a breathtaking lakeside forest. Caught between the soulful singer Joanne and the fiery free spirit Lily, Mike must navigate through choices, secrets, and emotions on the way to their hearts.
Will you help Joanne reclaim the stolen notes to help with her upcoming gig or go on a treasure hunt with Lily? Your decisions shape the story, unlocking surprises and steamy moments. Fun dialogue, intriguing mini-games, an expansive festival setting - every corner of this camp hides new experiences.

From repairing bonds with Fiona to unraveling the shy charm of Kira, your journey is filled with laughter, heat, and life-changing discoveries. Will you focus on the music, the treasure, or the relationships that make it all worth it?

Get ready to explore the festival, unravel its secrets, and make it a summer to remember!

Features:

  • Adult Content 🔞: Enjoy steamy animated scenes that bring your relationships to life.

  • Branching Stories 🌟: Forge your path through compelling narratives and choices that matter.

  • Festival Vibes 🎶: Immerse yourself in a world of indie rock, creative vibes, and sultry escapades.

  • Interactive Mechanics 🎮: Engage with characters using point-and-click gameplay, manage your inventory, play mini-games.

  • Multiple Endings 🔀: Every decision shapes your relationships, leading to unique conclusions.

data.short_description: Get ready to feel the heat in MILF's Camp🔥 - an adult visual novel set up around a summer festival. Music, free-spirited people and lots of beauties around! Pick between a rock star and the mysterious local MILFs - it’s your summer!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon, Intel
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
